channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: FIRE is mental illness — 233 replies — 634.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
FIRE is mental illness

Open thread • Replies: 233 • Updated: 2026-05-23 13:59 UTC

OP

No woman, no kids, $25k YEARLY spend.
You're not supposed to check out of society in your 30s and spend the rest of your life relaxing. What is wrong with modern men?

Early replies (first 3)

62259938
>>62259935
Keep slaving away goyman

62259945
>>62259935
Nice bait thread faggot

62259968
>>62259935
You can't really afford to marry on FIRE because one divorce ruins a decade+ of saving and then you have to work again. If a woman finds out you're FIRE she will absolutely divorce rape you too since the wealth disparity between you and her is so great she'll walk away with a ludicrous amount of money.

Huge downside of FIRE, you can never marry.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62264547
>>62263992
Yeah. But you absolutely CAN structure a legal one that lets you split premarital assets. That’s been my whole point. You’re comparing apples and railroad ties.

62264551
>>62264012
>still no proof
Keep going. This is fun.
>never had sex
Woman argument. You’ve lost and it’s clear.

62264565
>>62264379
The kid will have their mom's parents, grandparents, aunt and uncles, etc. That stuff can happen regardless, even in the West with two loving parents. And he can stay in the country and visit them from time to time if he really wants.

62264595
>>62259935
>You're not supposed to check out of society in your 30s and spend the rest of your life relaxing.
Kek, why not? I'm on the same exact path. Life is extremely cozy. Fuck this faggot society

62264600
>>62259968
>Huge downside of FIRE, you can never marry.
what kind of faggot do you have to be to unironically write this shit? If you even consider getting married in le current year, you are a wheelchair bound, drool tier fucking retard.

62264605
>>62260997
based

62264672
>>62264595
You’re supposed to slave away like everyone else.
lol.
“Society” is like 95% worker bees with no choice but to toll.

62264833
>>62259935
I dislike people cooking for me. I don't know how I will be able to voice this to my future wife

62264838
>Aw geez guys I have 76 years of spending saved up at 35 years old do I have enough to retire?
Uhh, yes. Congrats. Although he'd be better off putting most of it in a trust with a reasonable $40k/yr drawdown and pursue marriage as a trustfund kid, and not have to worry about divorce after that.

62264839
>>62260039
>>62262037
These comics were highly respected in the olden days. Remember this one?

62264927
>>62259968
Marry a rich bride, retard. Fucking low class roastoid marrying nigger, just kill yourself loser.

62264930
>>62259980
Where do all you currycels come from? Unbelievable.

62265011
>>62260025
Surrogacy. Be a single dad.

62265250
>>62259935
>You're not supposed to check out of society in your 30s

62265283
>>62259968
>marry
>because one divorce
Then don't marry?
>muh keedz
You can have them without marrying
>muh common law
Move somewhere where that's not a thing, or recycle through women.
>>62259993
>monk
You can enjoy life without living paycheck to paycheck. Sex is basically free if you find the right girl. Packing homemade food and eating somewhere new every weekend costs less than fast food.

62265591
>>62260376
>who's going to pay for my kids now
He will through taxes

62265814
>goy wants to be free
uh oh, stinky

62265828
>>62260306
You just need to have some imagination to make it feel more fun but most men are retarded simp faggots and they need to rely on a woman's bullshit to feel good when they fuck. Women learn to turn it into a fun artificial challenge so it hypes you up.

62265831
>>62263540
>you know, actual
Normalfag subhuman brain rot. You're too retarded to enjoy your free time. You have nothing to teach to your spawn.

62265857
>>62263428
Normalfags can only think in binary terms. They're literal cattle and they turn suicidal without a master's guidance. When normalfags get rich they go insane and start coping with drugs and prostitutes until they die of STDs, OD or suicide. They can't handle the freedom.

62265866
>>62264003
Ok it's not the same, it's a matter of time.
If you've been working for a year and don't have 10k saved you're fucked. If you've been working for 6 years and don't have $100k you're also fucked. And yes $10k is more like a short-term emergency cushion against day-to-day issues where $100k is more like a longer term yearish cushion that may be enough to comfortably make small investments in one's business or other opportunities without threatening that cushion.

Basically the normie never saves that much. Rather than thinking "I need to get enough money together so my investments pay for everything I want forever without drawing down the balance" normies just think about making payments for next month.

62265872
>>62262791
The egregore of society doesn't even give a shit that you think it doesn't deserve it. It just imports desperate people from war torn poverty stricken shitholes instead.

62265874
>>62262844
>>62261211
How is offering the system your children to use as taxcattle a fuck you to it?

62265878
>>62260844
>debt free
Meme. I'm debtmaxxing harder than the US of Pissrael.

62265882
>>62261114
(You)r penis is too pure to allow it to be defiled by a wench's vaginal secretions.

62265887
>>62261238
>swingers
military fag brainrot leads to cockrot
>>62262206
they're trying to buck break us into flipping burgers and it's working

62265888
>>62259935
You know you can easily have biological children without marriage right?

Just fucking cum in some young woman and keep doing it until ahe misses a period. If that makes you fags squeamish just pay some surrogate to carry your child while you enjoy escorts or casual dating and sex.

It really isn't that hard, and after the surrogate pushes your child out it'll be the last time you need to hear a woman yell at you ever again lol.

62265896
>>62264378
>This is not the person I would mock, he actually did fucking make it. I have no idea how you get 12 years in work make near 2 million and also a fully paid house jesus christ wow.
the stemfag market was goated 12 years ago, now you have to be the throte goat to find anything

62265903
>>62265888
My gf keeps eating the cum before it reaches her pussy though.

62265928
>>62265903
Wrong hole.
Blowjobs are nice but shoot for a simultaneous orgasm. By far the best sensation the human body can experience and it makes women more loyal to you (if they can feel such a thing).

item.title: Would you jestermaxx for a HR roastie to get a job, /biz/? — 16 replies — 64.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Would you jestermaxx for a HR roastie to get a job, /biz/?

Open thread • Replies: 16 • Updated: 2026-05-23 14:17 UTC

OP

Would you jestermaxx for a HR roastie to get a job, /biz/?

Early replies (first 3)

62265537
>>62265528

There’s no point cause they won’t hire you anyway

62265541
>>62265528
i would; these stupid bitches don't have any real power over me. just smile and act like a prince and they'll usually open the door for you. feigning interest in a job is not hard. pro tip: no one is actually excited to work for a wage. they know it and they know you know it so just play their little game.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62265566
>>62265528
I answered that for my first ever job interview in a grocery store and got hired (pre modern roastie HR hellscape)

62265616
>>62265528

62265629
>>62265528
id cave her head in the spot. yes im a NEET

62265632
>>62265528
you're asking this like we have any other choice. We WILL jestermaxx, we WILL eat the bugs, we WILL marry the ready to settle down roastie

62265647
>>62265616
AI slop, but surprisingly good one. Almost got fooled. I wonder what was the prompt.

62265664
>>62265528
Needing a job for money gives women the ick.

62265674
>>62265528
>Would you jestermaxx for a HR roastie to get a job, /biz/?
I was unemployed 2 fucking years and I don't even know how I got a job in the end. Yea you gotta do what you gotta do. I had to get an FBI background check and I don't even live or work in the USA.

62265710
>>62265674
If the spooks ask me what kind of person you are I'll tell them you are usually high on your own meth.
Sorry not sorry

62265713
>>62265647
Retard

62265716
>>62265710
I had a TS/SCI for 12 years but I'm out of that game.
Private sector (real private sector) is hard mode for a white man - you have to be hyper competent to have a job at all.

62265962
>>62265616
>I endured interviews where i crawled without touching the floor
imma still this one

62265966
>>62265713
Do you deny you’re posting AI slop?

62265968
>>62265528
that answer implies you'll be gone in 18 months with a job somewhere else for slightly higher pay

no shit they're moving on.

item.title: Make money with STEM degree! How is it possible? Anyone who is STEM and make it big? — 15 replies — 21.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
Make money with STEM degree! How is it possible? Anyone who is STEM and make it big?

Open thread • Replies: 15 • Updated: 2026-05-23 13:38 UTC

OP

Make money with STEM degree!
How is it possible?
Anyone who is STEM and make it big?

Early replies (first 3)

62264713
what's your idea of big? i fucked around completely until I was 26 or so, got a CS degree, 40 now and my networth is about 3.5m which includes a paid off house

62264717
>>62264704
>>62264713
so bullish at tech

62264731
>>62264704
>>62264713
How do you fuck around and then get a CS degree? Isn't having an high IQ a requirement? Idk how you waste right years and then jump back into college doing high level maths

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62264742
>>62264731
the hardest math class i took was a calc based linear algebra, it was pretty hard but i just made myself do it. I got like a B- or something in that class, it was enough to satisfy the requirement. most of the curriculum was learning how computer systems work and programming assignments.

i don't know, i think being older was a big advantage because i was dead set clear about why i was there and what i wanted to accomplish, vs. a bunch of retard immature kids who have no clue why they're even there or what they want to do. 26 isn't that old really, your brain isn't mush yet even though i'd basically been doing weed, shrooms and playing WoW full time for the past several years. I actually had a bit of a drinking problem - high functioning alcoholic but I've kicked that by now.

62264766
>>62264704
>>Make money with STEM degree!
>in 2026
a STEM degree will only make you poorer in 2026

62264773
>>62264713
Nice larp bro

>>62264766
Can confirm. Wish I had studied something boring like accounting.

62264781
>>62264704
Yes, I'm a civil engineer and I make a whopping... $95k/yr!

62264783
>>62264731
>Isn't having an high IQ a requirement?
kek, what? The average IQ of a CS student is like 120. If your IQ is below 120 you might as well go weld or something

62265449
>>62264781
Are you bald and fat and sleepless.

62265609
>>62264766
>a STEM degree will only make you poorer in 2026
This. You cooould make an argument for bachelors, but 4 years is a long time better spent accumulating exp.
Masters or further is a complete waste of time unless you are a clueless retard aiming for professorship.

62265611
>>62265449
I am. GF is a 10/10 though and doesnt have a cock either

62265759
>>62264704
>Make money with STEM degree!
>How is it possible?
>Anyone who is STEM and make it big?
made decent money, trick is to get into a large tech company in a growing market that offers EESOP employee stock purchase plans, and load up as much as you can and not sell it for 20 years, I got a MSEE then got into a semiconductor corp doing embedded controls, loaded up on company stock but sold too early

62265798
>>62264781
>$95k/yr
i'm kind of poor and that sounds like really good money to me. i make like 40k a year.
i would live like a little prince on 95k.

62265840
>>62264704
Get a doctorate and mindbreak boomer PE with buzzwords they dont understand

62265864
>>62264704
The only way to make money if you didn't inherit anything is to scam people.

item.title: I am ugly and 5'5'' how do i get disabilitybux and never have to work again i live in USA — 7 replies — 19.1/hr

Open thread • Replies: 7 • Updated: 2026-05-23 13:59 UTC

OP

I am ugly and 5'5'' how do i get disabilitybux and never have to work again

i live in USA

Early replies (first 3)

62262754
Be black

Not black? Get a name change then claim black heritage

62262757
>>62262748
you need to find a female state worker and trigger her maternal instincts. that's all it takes. she will feel good about herself for giving you other people money, like some kind of modern day hero. then once you're on the gibs list you're good just don't do anything out of line

62262767
>>62262757
thanks anon ive also been in hospital a few times for mental health shit so hopefully that helps my case
>>62262754
im white

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62262774
Claim extreme anxiety. It's probably the easiest one to prove.

62262853
>>62262748
Gaslight yourself into believing you have a real mental illness then go to a psychiatrist and convince them you are a threat to society and it's in the best interest of everyone to simply give you money instead of letting you participate in society. Worked for this one fat fag I know

62264160
>>62262767
spend some time on the beach and you wont be

62265927
>>62262748
bump

item.title: /Biz revival — 59 replies — 140.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
/Biz revival

Open thread • Replies: 59 • Updated: 2026-05-23 13:56 UTC

OP

while this board is clearly dead and all we have left is 10 anons, one of which is a aid devastated bald whiny fag, i think this is the perfect time to try to revive this board.

"How"? i'm hearing you ask.
Well. Let's make this a general where we only share our best picks. NO pointless SHILLING, either stocks or the occasional good crypto you really believe in.


I'll start.

Litecoin is now around 50$. This is a generational bottom if you look on the multi year chart. A solid support. At this price, unless you're convinced altcoins and cryptos are over, it's a free lottery ticket. In the same spirit, LITS, a company which treasury is only composed of its litecoin holding is also a great way to get litecoin exposure.

Ton, the crypto of one if not the most used chatting app worldwide is going back to a historical bottom as we speak after doing a small pump following several changes and pavel durov's statement. (20% staking apy, many other changes planned i won't go into details but good narrative)

A risky stock play but with very good risk / reward ratio: UBISOFT, company went to shit, but they are restructuring and trying to turn things around. A potential 10 bagger over the next years if they can achieve that, and they definitively can if they stop their bullshit.

Early replies (first 3)

62265475
>>62265467
Just buy OpenAI at IPO.
All normalfags will do that and outperform your "smart" plays.
There's such a thing as being too smart.

62265476
>>62265474
yeah that's precisely what we're trying to avoid you fucking retard. Stay poor

62265480
but what if I am bald?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62265663
>>62265658
It's 100% not possible maybe by 3030.
LTC is propped up because its very low transfer cost so it's used for cross platform transfers thus it's propped up.

62265665
>>62265658
Why LTC rather than any of the top 100 altcoins that do the exact same thing?

62265668
>>62265659
>Nothing is bullish
>Is it however baldish

Kek

62265670
>>62265665
Because they are married to their bags.
Number one mistake in crypto.
>HODL
was a psyop and most of the time results if not in losses a total wash.

62265685
>>62265663
Which Solana is roughly equivalent to at much higher throughput.

62265699
>>62265467
Good morning faggot, here's a theme for your thread.
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QEsNDDwhSJ4

62265703
>>62265475
>just be a baggie instead

62265708
>>62265685
except solana is a centralized scam

litecoin is a light bitcoin. It is undervalued at its current price. And yes, it's used EVERYWHERE crypto can be used. This should tell you something. nobody is going to be bullish on an undervalued bottomed asset, which is why you should buy. I have never made money buying something shilled or already up multiple Xs

>>62265699
good morning, hopefully your liver is going to have some sort of final stroke today

62265715
Just generally go with the flow of the market, going against it always gave me negative returns.

Take my profits and move on.

There's no point fighting a strong current when you don't have a boat to fetch you.

62265719
>>62265475
Probably the best advice. I've learnt with years that you're almost never 'too late'. I fucked so many investments thinking I was too late for years, then finally FOMOing at the actual top. For example I was first buying BTC in 2013 but never in real volume. Then basically rekt myself getting into chainlink in 2019.

62265720
>>62265715
just martingale on the way down, it's not that hard

62265728
>>62265719
Sometimes you’re not too late, you’re actually too soon.

62265729
they'll repump crypto someday

62265735
>>62265670
Indeed. A useful mantra in this situation could be:

>my bags don’t know I love them

62265741
>>62265630
>That should make you think hard before "left curving" anything in these stocks.
I will not think hard. Thinking hard is the enemy of making money. Just vibe and shiet.

62265774
>>62265467
>all we have left is 10 anons
That's all we ever had. The rest were bots and shill farms in Hyderabad.

62265796
>>62265741
>this is what 16 continuous years of secular bull market did to Anon’s brain

I guess you’re too young to remember the dotcom bubble, maybe you weren’t even born back then? In any case, see you at the bottom with your bags.

62265801
>>62265796
Been here since 1973 fucker. You think you are oh so smart predicting le next bubble. You are not.

62265805
>>62265720
>just martingale on the way down, it's not that hard
steps in your path

62265816
>>62265801
I don’t think I am smart, I think and I am smart.

Successfully predicted the 2020 crash, successfully bought the dips in 2022 and 2025 at their nadir, and am successfully predicting the upcoming crash. You will make money during the mega IPOs to come, but don’t hold the fucking bags.

62265818
>>62265728
Yeah i've chronically been an 'early adopter' of things and completely failed to think of the economic opportunities of it.

> in crypto since 2013 - didn't invest
> stockpiled for COVID december 2019 - didn't make any relevant investments
> started using chatgpt, dalle and midjourney 2022 - didn't invest

I'm hoping in future to just be more economically/investment minded in anything that grabs my interest

62265835
>>62265818
NTA but watch the battery space like a goddamn hawk.
Electrochemistry & Physical chemistry are degenerate niggermagic of the highest order and even outside of unnecessarily politicized applications the market is HUNGRY to get its hands on something that actually charges *fast* fast.

62265844
>>62265835
It's not an area i'm too knowledgeable on which makes investing majorly risky. I've seen loads of meme promised battery revolutions over the years.

That said I've found the BYD charging capacity pretty wild. I would have bought one were it not for the fact my gov blocks them for our safety...

62265870
>>62265708
It's my pancreas you absolute banana.
Only stroke I'm having is a stroke of genius.

62265877
>>62265467
Fucking Kek. I’ll tell you but you won’t like it. This will save all of crypto when it gets back to the ATH:
Luna Classic

62265879
>>62265467
Here's some advice wait till the economy breaks a bit and invest into some gay ghostchain like XTZ
I made a lot off XTZ multiple times doing it and guided others to do the same, esp swinging it because it typically follows eth but since it's mostly dead when it does move it moves hard, in 2021 during the bullrun it went from like 1 dollar to 9 and I swung that fucker for like 20k in a week.

62265881
>>62265818
Don’t worry Anon. It’s okay as long as you don’t make moves based on collective overexcitement (buying the obvious top due to FOMO, and then having to hold 10 years to make a profit).

Wait until fear or indifference dominate the landscape. And it always happens sooner or later. We had 3 crashes in the stock market since January 2020, and we’re currently in the 3rd crypto winter in 6 years.

Just one massive move at the right time can compensate for 10 years of doing nothing.

62265911
>>62265467
I told you faggots to buy intel and amd 6 months ago and you didn't listen.

62265918
>>62265879
and you make fun of me for holding LTC?
shitcoins that did x50 or so in 2021 and didn't pump this run are done for.

62265919
>>62265486
>left curve it
normalfagmaxxing, good luck with that shit

item.title: PACK. A. SANDWHICH. WITH. SOME. CHIPS. — 139 replies — 75.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
PACK. A. SANDWHICH. WITH. SOME. CHIPS.

Open thread • Replies: 139 • Updated: 2026-05-23 12:31 UTC

OP

PACK. A. SANDWHICH.

WITH. SOME. CHIPS.

Early replies (first 3)

62262487
>>62262449
maybe don't buy guac if you are poor and it costs $4.90

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62264124
>MAGA is telling you to eat like a slave so we can continue funding wars for Israel
>the same people that squealed like pigs a few years ago because eggs were pricey

62264174
>just eat poisonous fake food goyslop, goyim
>real food is reserved for us, not you

62264324
>>62263155
Yes its especially important while developing.

62264336
>>62264324
It's about humiliation. My expensive food isn't as good unless I make you eat garbage.

62264558
>>62262607
I agree with you anon. Boomers are boomers, don’t need to beat that dead horse. But routinely eating out is retarded on many levels.

62264577
>>62264124
this lol
fucking pathetic

62264580
>>62263206
Post body fatass

62264583
>>62262454
I love Dave Ramsey. Even more than loving him, I love when poor, stupid zoomers talk about how he's a retard and doesn't know anything. Then I ask them how a retard boomer like Dave becomes worth hundreds of millions of dollars while they can't afford a running car.

62264663
>>62262607
I think my dad was 19 years old when the gold standard was abandoned. Crazy what boomers got away with.

62264675
yes, you deserve to have fast food delivered to your door. yes, you deserve to have it chewed and dropped into your mouth.

62264691
>>62264583
I can afford a running car doe

62264733
>>62264583
>you being born into a dystopian hellscape economy is the same as being born a boomer with daddy's money backing him during the most prosperous time in human history

nice bait

62264944
>>62264089
> Unless you're on the road, there's no excuse for fast food anymore. It doesn't taste good, it's not healthy, and it's the same price as a normal takeout joint.
This. You can get to go meals from a real restaurant for like $2 more if you don’t feel like cooking or whatever. Fast food isn’t a value at all. It’s a necessity when you don’t have other options. Or if you’re retarded

62264946
>>62264122
Based

62264980
>>62262862
That's common here in New Zealand as well.
I've seen people turn up with;

A whole cooked chicken and nothing else.
A 12 pack of bread rolls and a tin of Tuna.
One large bag of carrots.
A tin of Baked Beans and no can opener.
A loaf of bread and a smoked chicken breast.
Half a dozen cooked snags.
Plain rice and a chicken drumstick.
Two Sea Urchins.
A cheesy loaf.
A banana bunch.

Last nights dinner is very common.

62265020
>>62262598
you can put a loaf of bread in the fridge to make it last longer, anon

62265030
>>62263602

62265033
>>62263530
they are too retarded to understand that the shiny rocks are what go into their computers to design and make their pokemon cards

62265037
>>62265020
depends on conditions, more important for bread is air tightness and moister.. putting it in some fridges can make it go faster depending.. you can freeze bread and defrost it as you need pretty fast though

62265043
>>62265037
For toast putting the bread in the freezer is just sensible.

62265138
>>62265020
Just stick it in a bread bin like a normal person

62265148
>>62262449
boomer here

I was 30 years old when I could afford to eat at a restaurant for anything other than a special occasion. I was 40 when I could afford to eat at a restaurant whenever I wanted.

younger generations don't get a lot of pity for demanding luxuries we worked our asses off for and they think are just rights every person deserves.

same with houses. And new cars. Earn it. It took us decades of work.

62265153
>>62265138
Look at this fancy fuck with his bread humidor.

62265271
I'm bringing bread and cheese and ham and some fucking canned soup with me to Stockholm next week to beat the Swedish jew and there's nothing you can do to stop me. And some booze in my checked bag. Buying alcohol in Sweden will bankrupt a millionaire.

62265280
>>62262630
To be honest you can make bread on the griddle, so the bread maker is just wasted money.

62265288
>>62265271
Buy Felix' Gulasch when you're there. It is a yummy soup.

62265303
>he doesn’t make his own bread

62265600
>>62265288
We have soup here where I live. I don't need to pay 10€ for a can or jar of Swedish goulash slop.

62265622
>check thread
>It's still an Indian psyop to get you to eat bread for every meal and live like a prisoner and be happy
I hate this board now

62265722
Isn't it obvious this entire thing is just the uber business model being deployed to food?

1. Establish yourself in an area
2. Undercut the competition
3. Make as many people as possible rely on your service
4. Establish a near monopoly
5. Raise prices
6. Profit

I mean people like to point out that the fast food prices went up during covid and blamed the money printing and rising wages. That neglects the people who were serious about the lockdown basically not leaving the house and just ordering delivery over and over until they got used to the idea. Then loan shark services like klarna drops by and offers people a way to extend the use even when you don't have money.

I mean one of the delivery companies literally is Uber.

item.title: S&P 500 priced in gold — 13 replies — 45.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
S&P 500 priced in gold

Open thread • Replies: 13 • Updated: 2026-05-23 14:03 UTC

OP

everyone screeching about ATHs
S&P up 465% since 2001 in dollars
same index DOWN 64% in gold
one unit of S&P bought 143g gold in 2001
buys 50g today

Early replies (first 3)

62265597
thats some insane dollar depreciation familia

62265612
>>62265573
>cherry-picked entry point at the height of the dot-com bubble.

62265628
>>62265612
Good point. But that was the max historical data available on the platform where I saw this.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62265673
>>62265573
Yeah if you invest 100 bucks in sp500 for 50 years you won't even become a millionaire by the proper metrics

62265681
gold is overpriced

62265688
>>62265673
Exactly! Most people don't understand dollar debasement.

62265689
I was just thinking to myself I wanted to lose 10% of my money in conversion fees

62265694
>>62265681
Not really. Gold depreciated over 90% against many individual stocks. Just look at apple or any major stock.

62265736
>>62265573
source?

62265797
>>62265736
contrafiat.com

62265860
>>62265694
stocks are even more overpriced

62265944
>>62265694
PMs have become a shitcoin thanks to market manipulation done by wallstreet subhumans. They're not that useful anymore.
>>62265628
You can easily create your own, just ask GPT to get some data from yahoo finance and make one with python if you're too dumb.

item.title: Anon, its my bday today Im in early 30s, close to no friends, no gf (ditched a bitch around 2 years ago), not much in th… — 59 replies — 30.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Anon, its my bday today Im in early 30s, close to no friends, no gf (ditched a bitch around 2 years ago), not much in th…

Open thread • Replies: 59 • Updated: 2026-05-23 12:23 UTC

OP

Anon, its my bday today
Im in early 30s, close to no friends, no gf (ditched a bitch around 2 years ago), not much in the bank, had a successful career but then pivoted to make a startup and lost shit ton of money and time in the process. Not sure what to do anymore. Basically going through the dark night of the soul.

Now I'm here trying to find a tech job in a fucking US to not die on the street. You are, as usual, my only real friend.

Tell me something nice or not.

Early replies (first 3)

62261420
>>62261414
>Now I'm here trying to find a tech job in a fucking US
Are you a foreigner? Is this a LARP?

62261422
You did good

62261428
>>62261414
Your life can turn around in a week easy. New job, new girl, market pumps, whatever. Don't be so down anon you don't know what is around the corner. Also you're only early 30s, you're young as fuck, you have to live as long as you already have all over again before you hit mid 60s, just think how long that truly is. Stop worrying and enjoy your life you fag.

Happy Birthday, enjoy the magic trick.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62263942
>>62261512
Irish here. Because I went from making 52k€ to 200k USD by moving here.

62263944
>>62262866
Glad you liked it.
I was banging an 18 year old last year but got tired of it.
She had a kid already right after

62263952
>>62263942
but now you owe double taxes typically, or if you go back home, and cost of living in the US is more than likely higher than euros
I should have been a software fag, instead im a sickfag
this place is insanely expensive, how you enjoying the US?
Btw they just converted most gas to e-15 overnight watch it with your car, it can slag certain engines, this place is going to shit fast.

62263962
>>62263952
>Owe double taxes
No I don’t. Ireland and the USA have tax treaties. The cost of living where I live (east coast) is high but does not scale to eat up all of my income, otherwise I wouldn’t have moved here.
I am thoroughly enjoying the USA and wish I could stay but unfortunately my company are a bunch of cunts and don’t sponsor people. Been grand so far. Despite all of the stereotypes I work with geniuses in my field and there’s not that many turbo fatties.

62263984
what was the startup idea?

62264000
>>62263962
I figured you would like it, i have a friend Im trying to convince to move here, I'd sponsor him though I'm sure his work would.

If you get a chance to come back shoot for the midwest, Cerner has a lot of software jobs though might have changed names, cost of living is quite a bit less and still a chance to get a good home for decent pricing.

62264015
>>62264000
I’m not a software engineer, I’m a chemical engineer. Also, I’m supposed to move to the Midwest for the last year of my visa. Missouri.

62264068
>>62264015
There ya go I live in KC, there's a bayer plant I believe not too far off from me.

62264074
>>62264015
Also spray me with your poisons mister.

62264117
>>62261414
so you had one. stop whining you made your choices

62264167
>>62261501
worst cat picture

62264433
>>62263944
>banging an 18 year old last year
Schizo head canon until proven otherwise

62264610
>>62261414
You are a baby at 30

62264632
>>62261414
K-K-K-K-K-K-KWAB

62264651
>>62264074
>>62264068
No way. We should become bros when I move there.

62264653
Buy a pressure washer

62264665
>>62261414
You sound like a normal person.
The average person with a “wife” or “gf” are in a desperate position to keep their partner and has no leverage over the relationship anyways.
The average salary is $65k and is heavily pulled up by high earners.

62264676
>>62261414
even through the darkest nights, self improve. Focus on becoming better and growing more knowledge and experience. It will be the only thing you can take with you after death. Then you get to become a part of me. You all will as I will you

62264696
>>62264651
lol might be related I'm irish on both sides of my fathers side then again on my mothers, O'Noonans/Picts.
If you get your citizenship housing is still very cheap here and plenty of small cozy towns with 400-900 people only an hour or so from the big city.

62264705
>>62264433
lol she was a depressed black girl I met doordashing, was stressful due to one her being so young, and two her mom was my age lol.

62264708
>>62264433
I'd have to drop her off around the corner, wasn't illegal obviously but if her dad and mom had found out I was their age I'm fairly sure the dad might have shot me.
Luckily nobody ever caught wind of it, but she kept doing LSD with her friends and then call me asking to drive her away because shes having bad trips, I wasn't into it, I pushed her to date a guy she liked growing up with because it was the right thing to do, I didn't however expect her to get pregnant immediately, oh well she has some pretty bad beef curtains, but sadly think it was natural.

62264726
Sorry bros if I don't respond I got a terrible migraine today it happens a lot to me, but I got some dino nuggies and gonna sleep after.
It's interesting now when i get migrianes which might be stemming from the tumor in my fucking neck I feel this invisible crown on my head.
Almost like wearing a baseball cap except it's invisible the sensation of wearing a crown from my skull.
Then usually mind bending pain and nausea, once it happened to me in 2023 and I think my kidney was infected but I saw Ophainm and a green eye eminating from the middle of it looking at me.
Was the only hallucination I've ever experienced, and some out of body experiences during a bone marrow biopsy where I could see them drilling into my spine.
If I survive much longer I'm going to be shocked this surgery should have killed my ass.
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3hnCT4yx0TM

62264747
And sorry for hijacking your thread if it is your birthday anon.
Have a pepe, your birthday is the same as my xister, who I can't really stand.

62264759
>>62261414
If it is your goal to improve, you will, even slowly. But it will not fall into your lap, at home especially. You will look back at these times and laugh.

62264763
>>62264696
What is Lenexa/ Shawnee/ Olathe like?

62264802
>>62264763
Rich and jewish, so downtown KC was all jews for a long time and grandview, after everything started getting older and more blacks and mexicans moved in they all uprooted and went to "leawood" but now leawoods getting old, expensive houses but now likely getting old, similar with Lenexa, Overland park is nice but again this is like a super rich migrated area so everythings much more expensive that being said there is a wonderful sushi restaurant in Lenexa named Sushi Uni, if you were to pick one I'd go Lenexa, it's less expensive than the leawood area.
Kansas taxes are shit, missouri has legal weed and lower gas prices and tobacco/housing.

The smarter people live in Lee's summit where I grew up but it's getting little crowded.
I'm actually thinking about leaving the city myself I had a farm as a kid in El dorado springs but my dad sold it to piss my mom off.

62264879
>>62261512
Deporting the illegals, lower taxes/higher pay, owning guns, etc…

62265650
>>62262803
>30y old.
>You are baby.
What's up with unc copes lately? 30 is when your life is basically over and your duty is to nourish the next generation.

62265678
>>62261414
>had a great career but thought I was smarter than I actually am so I tried to start my own business and failed
>could’ve had a cozy life but got greedy
>let me go to my favorite racist pedo chat board to complain

62265707
>>62261414
Man I wish I was 30 again, I could fix everything in my life. Happy Birthday

item.title: HODL and buy more BTC. — 80 replies — 15.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
HODL and buy more BTC.

Open thread • Replies: 80 • Updated: 2026-05-23 09:11 UTC

OP

If you still don’t own any Bitcoin yet, anon what the hell are you waiting for?

>Banks give you tiny interest while inflation slowly destroys your purchasing power anyway. I’d rather have BTC long term than let my money rot in a savings account.

Early replies (first 3)

62245757
i get 5btc later for cheaper but thanks for the advice!

62245760
>>62245741
Too eqrly but yeah and avoid cex or at least take it out as fast as u can!

62246438
>>62245757

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62258577
>>62257680
you have zero bitcoin

62258754
>>62257223

62258775
>>62257679
nonsense. It's all in your head

62258793
>>62258754

62259397
>>62245757
lets hold hands and buy in Oct

62259745
>>62259397

62260090
>>62259745
He’s buying

62261050
>>62257679
BTC infrastructure is basically trying to solve that balance now: preserving self custody while making native BTC more usable across broader financial systems. Maybe you’re just not updated yet.

62261057
>>62252472
Buy btc for many reasons anon.

62261131
>>62257675
*sends 5 million dollars worth of gold across the world in 5 minutes for a nominal fee*

62261260
>>62261050
It's kinda scary to go deeper with that
>>62261131
Plus big chance for theft

62261264
>>62258793
Hello I'm here

62261340
>>62257392
>>62261260

62261342
>>62252488
50k? Nooo way

62261452
>>62260090
100k by October

62261462
>>62261452
no chance
this will count as the summer of the big dump

62261476
>>62261462
Your opinion doesn't matter to me

62261608
>>62261340

Better to explore and understand the TBV direction early before launch.

62261618
>>62261462

62261632
>>62252488

62261641
>>62261131

62262278
>>62259397

62262820
>>62261608
No need to rush. People will figure it out eventually. You can already see more attention shifting toward DeFi outside the usual Ethereum-only lane anyway.

62262829
>>62261131
And people still wonder why institutions keep accumulating BTC.

62262834
>>62256924

62262852
Bitcoin is the future

62262893
>>62262278

>Rave

62264806
>>62262852

62265221
>>62258793

62265362

item.title: why does this keep happening — 36 replies — 11.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
why does this keep happening

Open thread • Replies: 36 • Updated: 2026-05-23 11:06 UTC

OP

>Link pumps to $10
>BTC instantly takes a nosedive

Why is Link not allowed to go above $10?

Early replies (first 3)

62263473
because fuck you, stinkie
it really all boils down to that
the entire crypto market exists JUST TO FUCK YOU STINKIES OVER
how does that make you feel
it makes me feel pic related

62263519
>>62263473
hey it's the dick guy

62263588
But Sirgay said they've decoupled from crypto prices

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62263870
>>62263230
Take your meds, its literally just following the btc chart. All the alt charts are the same.
Btc pumps = alts pump
Btc dumps = alts dump

Idk why you retards think link is the one causing btc to pump and dump when its the other way around

62264096
>>62263870
Sure thing rabbi

62264135
Coinbase constantly has positive notifications sent out for link, but the price is always shidding and farding.
For example: pic related

62264172
>>62263870
>ts literally just following the btc chart.
Bitcoin was crabbing, and the second Link pumped and hit $10, Bitcoin dumped.

Are you blind.

62264180
>>62264172
sweetie you forgot your medicine :}

62264354
>>62263230
because you're retarded enough to think that BTC is dumping because of LINK's movement rather than LINK is dumping because of BTC's movement.

62264389
>>62263473
why does this bitch have such a pointy schnoz, is she a kike?
t. link investoor (newfag)

62264394
>>62263870
>Btc pumps = alts pump
>Btc dumps = alts dump
More like
Btc pumps = alts dump
Btc dumps = alts dump
simple as

62264410
>>62264354
No he understands that BTC dumps, to drag link down, before it pumps too high

Just DCA anons, they'll unleash it when they're ready

62264427
>>62264410
Wrong you dumb link nigger. EVERYTHING dumps when BTC dumps. Every single coin has TA levels called resistances and supports. Shitcoins like LINK won't break its resistance without permission from BTC (permission being BTC breaking through its own resistance level) so LINK will just sit at resistance waiting on BTC's permission to go higher. If BTC dumps then LINK will dump without ever breaking the current resistance because it is a shitcoin and BTC controls movement.

Your inability to understand this is why you're poor and still bagholding absolute garbage after all these years. Hope this helps.

62264474
>>62264427
retard

62264483
>>62264474
stay poor bagholder

62264512
>>62264474
we'll never let u live it down stinker
you lost

62264795
>>62264172
Btc spiking is exactly what caused link to go to $10 dumbfuck

62264817
We will dump BTC
We will turn hanta into covid 2.0
We will pop the AI bubble
We will start WW3
We will do whatever it takes, and there's nothing you can do about it linkie

62264876
>>62263230
>Link pumps to $10
>pumps
Does anyone else remember when linkies could've exited for $30+?

62264877
>>62264427
>EVERYTHING dumps when BTC dumps.
That's not responding the argument being made m8. The claim is that link pump > BTC dump - not BTC dump > link dump. If you were contending with the thread seriously, the counterpoint should be that bitcoin dumps when ANYTHING pumps. But that wasn't your counterpoint. Because it doesn't happen. And you know you're being disingenuous.

62264884
>>62264877
you're a poor bagholding loser who has held for 8 years and missed countless opportunities.

62264934
>>62264877
you're a poor bagholding loser who has held for 8 years and missed countless opportunities.

62265147
>>62263870
Sure that's why shit like tron and hype pumped while BTC crashed..kys

62265193
>>62264795
>Btc spiking
what the fuck are you smoking

62265210
>>62265193
link is never gonna go to a 1000 buckerinos

62265234
>>62263230

im posting a screenshot of what i wrote because tranny jannies want to censor trvth nuke as fuck.

Fuck you jannies.

62265249
>>62265234
I knew screenshot anon was fucking retarded

62265256
>>62263230
Sergey gotta eat

62265265
>>62265256
by dumping BTC?

62265301
>>62264934
This

Cuckolds can’t accept that their poverty was caused by poor investment decisions rather than a nefarious cabal suppressing their shitcoin kek

62265313
>>62265301
Why does BTC dump on every major LINK news & pumps

It crashed below 100k the day smartcon began too

62265377
>>62265313
you're a cuckold

62265581
>>62263230
because it's heading to $0

62252856

if I didn't need the cash and had to sell for fiat I would have a much needed two thousand fucking dollars right now
keep stacking brothers

62253216
>>62252856

62253224

He know he isn't from Lebanon but his location came up Florida multiple times when the sharty hack was released he was a trial janitor here.

62253228
>>62252856

62254644
>>62253228

nigger I would fucking beat you up just because you're that spiteful

62255610

item.title: 16 years ago today Laszlo Hanyecz paid 10,000 BTC for 2 pizzas — 27 replies — 8.2/hr
item.content:encoded:

Open thread • Replies: 27 • Updated: 2026-05-23 11:02 UTC

OP

Two pizzas aren’t on the table; they’re sitting at it. This was a deliberate act of rub, clearly signalling to the right crowd. BTW, where are these kids now? Because I can find his recent photos, but zero photos of *his* kids.

Early replies (first 3)

62261169
>>62261166
Still more valuable than anything else bitcoin has ever done

62261183
Why isn’t this diverse

62261194
>>62261183
ew

62261207
>>62261166
haha yeah wouldn't that be funny. lucky me even back then it was impossibly hard to mine so i have none

62261263
>>62261166
bro those kids are 20+ years old they don't live at home anymore dumb fuck, at that age parents get a picture or two a year if lucky. less if they live out of town.

62261274
>>62261263
That dad is 100% gay you can see it on his face and his faggy kids, similar to that jewish actor Sabretooth whos son was sucking on his bike handle like it was a sucker, now he's a famous trans femboy.

62261301
>>62261166

62261391
>>62261166

62261396
>>62261166

62261400
>>62261166

62261517
>>62261263

62261678
>>62261391

62261685
>>62261166
child trafficking right there in front of everyone all in the name of monetary freedom

62261687
>>62261517
Not everyone broadcasts their life's online you zoomer fuck. There are literally zero images of me on the internet outside of some old Facebook friends from 10 years ago and I have been online since 95

62262003

62262910
>>62261274
>>62261166
why are you such a massive faggots? you are stinky ALTers, aren't you.
fuck off, losers

62263805
>>62261166

"be a good little moon boy, don't do anything useful or productive, dont figure shit out. buy moon coin and watch the line go up and down like a good little boy. don't forget to wonder who Satoshi Nakamoto is every once an awhile to switch things up." literally go die

62263868

62263880
>>62263868

62264470

62264492

62264689
>>62262003

62264729
>>62261166

62265428
>>62264105

item.title: NTDOY — 62 replies — 7.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
NTDOY

Open thread • Replies: 62 • Updated: 2026-05-23 06:05 UTC

OP

Currently Nintendo stock is extremely mispriced. All the short-term doom and gloom is priced in, ignoring the company's tremendous long-term upside. While it's not some 10x your money in a week meme coin, at this point it's a sleeper stock to hold you should know about.

Early replies (first 3)

62259388
>>62259371
its not mispriced. they make shitty games for 80+$. no one wants to buy their crap because its shit.

62259405
>NTDOY baggie
KWAB

62259407
>>62259371
not misspriced
no point in shilling your bags here btw
>>62259388
this and console era is coming to an end. Future will be only game stations with steam like platforms. retards still go for the ps5 by some sort of pavlovian reflex. it's just a standardized computer with a standardized controller. Nintendo shined for a while 30 years ago now it has become so cringe i can't stand their adds like wtf is even this shit

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62260032
>>62259371
>making this thread again
Please god nuke the third world

62260035
>>62259371
I agree. Not because of vidya, but because of Pokémon cards. The market cap of all PSA10 graded Pokémon cards is over $75B. Nintendo's market cap os only $53B. It makes no sense that the company that makes the cards is worth so much less than the cards themselves.

62260053
>>62260004
Nintendo could actually get away with it (releasing a Switch 3, 4, 5, etc. forever) by not being so retarded and underwhelming… Instead they will be forced to invent something else that may or may not be successful.

62260188
>>62259371
Thanks

62260304
>>62259371
agreed p/e is slurpable, nintendo aint going away

62260335
>>62259884
already priced in

62260390
Apple is apple

62260407
I bought a Rog ALLY X and it’s 100000x better than the switch I had for my son. You know the target audience? My kid uses the Ally to watch YouTube play actual fun games. He cares more about Spider-Man than bing bing wahoo slop. Nintendo failed to capture the audience by marketing to childless manchildren just like Disney Adults. They have no market share and sell an inferior product. Pokémon still looks and plays like an indie game from 2005. (lol)

Enjoy your bags tendie you get what you deserve.

62260606
>>62260407

62261314
Sorry about your hopes of pumping your bags OP, but I'll just leave this here...
>https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=luiKV1nHB1w

62261355
>>62259371
The switch 2 is overpriced. People who have money don't even know what it is. It also demotes the value of the switch one, which partially went subscription based model. So it was bad business design.

62261416
Tell me the last time they ever release a ground breaking software or hardware? The new pokemon is not a cashgrab.

62261518
anyway, you know when a retard here shill some stock:
1/ he is clueless no amount of shiling here will pump it not even 0.01%

2/therefore it's a bad pick

it's cringe.last retard shilled mc donald like it was some secret gem. The real blackpill is whatever gets shilled here don't buy it or even better sell it if you have some (pokemon cards, random crypto that miraculously pumped x10, nintengoy stocks, mc goynald stock, whatever)

62261624
>>62260035
>It makes no sense that the company that makes the cards is worth so much less than the cards themselves.
What psychogenic kush are you smoking? It makes a ton of sense. By your logic, a goldsmith can't have created a masterpiece work that he has sold 20 years ago but which is now recognized to be more valuably than his entire shop.

62261625
Value Trap 2: Electric Boogaloo

62261640
>>62259371
I agree. They are the one last big truly JP dev remaining, huge franchise value that's only getting better, the only one console with exclusives, ninety-something % of the serious handheld business with proper customer attachment, JP approach to quality as opposed to deadlines, no DEI, success with theme park now expanding, huge success with the films now.
No reason not to own their stock, I think it's a good 50% undervalued.

62261642
>2009
>Nintendo has suffered a drawdown of 50%
>ZOMG invest in Nintendo!!
>keeps dropping
>10 years to reach the position you entered

Yeah nah, I know a correction when I see it.

62261677
>>62261625
kek.
What is your average OP?
Buying this above 2 is like giving to a charity

62262033
>>62261314
Already priced in

62262739
6months performance : - 45%
1 month perfomance : -12%
today's perfomance : - 0.47%

wow troontendgoy really IS daw new millionaire maker!

62263011
>>62259371
Kids don't buy games anymore. If they play games, it's free shit like fortnite and roblox

62263036
>>62263011
Also they know how to pirate.

62263054
>>62261640
>DEI
Holy shit lmaoo, it's so cringe in vidya DEI is still a hot topic while all other sectors of the economy have moved on 2 years ago. Drenched with pozz.

62263652
>>62262739
>anon argues against buying dips
I reckon you're one of those faggots who buys high and sells low

62263715
>>62259371
People aren't interested in bing bing wahoo anymore.

62263737
Nintendo even fucked over collectors with the Switch 2, I just can't justify buying physical games when they're not even on cart, this shit will have zero resale value in 10 years when the servers are no longer around. And buying digital is retarded unless they're extremely discounted.

62264904
>>62259407
>console era is coming to an end
xbox is dead and playstation is reversing its multiplat strategy so no

62264915
>>62259371
It’s not, Nintendo is failing hard lately. It is a slop company of shit now. Switch 2 was a massive disappointment. No innovation or anything just slightly better specs. Nintendo has ran out of ideas and are in the milking phase of their company, and the cows utters are almost dry

62264949
>>62263652
buy the dip is for spy, anon

62265067
>>62264904
Reversing to sell PS6, then unreversing. Nah, not gonna fall for it.

item.title: THE DECOUPLING HAS ARRIVED — 39 replies — 6.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
THE DECOUPLING HAS ARRIVED

Open thread • Replies: 39 • Updated: 2026-05-23 08:41 UTC

OP

The mad lad really did it bros, check the charts

Early replies (first 3)

62261996
OH FUCK IM GONNA DECOUPLEEEEE

62262000
>>62261990
>>62261996

KABOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOM!!!!!!!!!!!!

SO FXCKING BULLISH CHAINLINK SAAAAAAAAAAAAR

62262002
Kabooooom

Links going to $20 by end of month!

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62262062
>>62262013
YEH SERGEY! FUCK IM UP!

62262285
Do you guys think the run to 1k is going to be a scenario where you wake up and link is up 300% and everyone is losing their minds, or do you think it's going to be a 10 year run of +2% days and never having a red day again?

62262300
time to crash btc i guess

62262350
>what's that? link at $10!
>pull it.

62262393
>LINK hits 10.03
>BTC takes a dive

Im just not gonna sell

62262397
ok boomers

62262405
>>62262285
after all the fake and gay market manipulation bullshit, it deserves to go straight to 1k in a single candle

62262418
>>62262405
This is exactly how XRP holders think

62262427
>>62262418
>don't believe your lying eyes goy!
bitcoin is used to manipulate the price of link, I don't give a fuck about your whataboutisms

62262533
>>62262427
Its funny how by doing that shit they erased 99% of people from buying Link but the 1% that bought have metric fuckloads and a vengeance. Almost worse.

62263186
>>62262418
XRP isn't getting adopted by DTCC later this year.

62263224
>>62262285
Link is never going close to 40 ever again kek and the only way it makes a new ath, is BTC going upwards of 500k. Very unlikely scenario for the next 15 years

62263238
>>62263224
>the only way it makes a new ath, is BTC going upwards of 500k
Nah the only way Link makes a new ath is BTC not dumping every time Link moves.

62263256
>>62263238
Bro cmon, be honest, we're at literally at 0.00012 sats, we got raped by Sirgay and it's over. We have lost, it's just another shitcoin and it will never recover in any meaningful way, while king shitcoin has a chance of making new aths.

62263278
>>62263256
>we got raped by Sirgay
Fucking how?

We got raped by 6 years of Bitcoin dumping on every single Link pump and announcement.

62263287
>>62263278
Are you retarded?
I literally bagholded link from .00169 sats to the shit it is now at 0.00012, i would had made it having sold all my Link and converted to BTC, now I'm a bagholder and definitely selling all my unstaked shit if it reaches 20-25

62263293
>>62263287
Yes, because we got raped by 6 years of Bitcoin dumping on every single Link pump and announcement.

62263337
>>62263293
Whatever bro, we were at 20 bucks at what 2019-2020? It's been 6 years and we're not even at 10. BTC is at 77k and shitting itself still.
Link has failed for more and I'm tired of pretending it hasn't. Build rewards? Staking? All shit same as link, fuck that fat fucking scammer. Satoshi nakamoto my ass

62263373
Dude... the thing isn't moving at all

62263385
>>62263337
this but unironically

62264177
>>62263337
See >>62263293

62264242
>>62262285
spike to $1k for a whole minute then dump back to $10 never to rise again

62264451
>>62261990
We finally did it lads

Let the seething resume

62264756
>>62261990
The switch has been flipped!

62264777
>>62262030
>Well I sold 1k to realize some profits for the probable reckoning coming
This is a "its going to go lower so I may as well sell" post subconciously disguised as a "my investment did well and its time to reap the rewards"

And yes I'm a licsensed phsychiatrist. Take care of your mental health in Q3 bro.

62264863
>>62264777
Those digits. Not really, it was like $900 dollars and I cut my realized loss for the year from 10k to 9k. If I sold em all it’d be closer to 20k realized loss but I’m just gonna hang in there. Need to be more patient instead of exiting so early. Still annoyed about intel but whatever. The pain of selling it all and it ripping is infinitely larger than me holding through a drop to sub $5

62264991
>>62264756
switch flipped

62265135
>>62261990
Check the chart, not decoupled from BTC LOL

62265290
he decoupled linkies from their money lol

62265312
We are going to make it with the power of positive thinking link marines!

KABOOOOOM

item.title: >*predicts the price of BTC in your path* — 22 replies — 5.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
>*predicts the price of BTC in your path*

Open thread • Replies: 22 • Updated: 2026-05-23 10:13 UTC

OP

>*predicts the price of BTC in your path*

Early replies (first 3)

62263829
Well, except for today, wtf

You're supposed to go up today, you stupid coin

62264034
>>62261213
literal meme lines

62264038
>>62263829
>trick algos into thinking the price will go up so they buy
>dump into them with size
thanks for playing!

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62264048
>>62264034
I promise I'm working on a 85-IQ friendly version

62264064
>it doesnt work
>im making an 85 iq version
good you can finally pretend to understand

62264083
>>62264064
>78% hit rate since 2024
>nails trend for 2 months
>one date of noise (so far)
>"it doesn't work"

62264123
>>62264083
>youre still poor
?

62264146
>>62264123
>quoting me calling you something I only strongly implied

62264150
>>62264146
>you're still poor
?

62264159
>>62264150
>quoting me calling you something I only strongly implied

62264163
>>62261213
When and at what price will the next 2 year low be

62264178
>>62264163
No idea. The outputs are based on a physics simulation that predicts likely market pivot points, and the output starts to blur about 5 weeks out so I run it in 4-week chunks. "Buy on green arrows/sell on red arrows/derisk on yellow diamonds" has been pretty reliable, especially when you add liquidity-based confirmation/invalidation (red x's or green checks)

Historically speaking? Early-mid June

62264197
>>62264178
>”I have no idea what I’m talking about and my indicator is unreliable at best!”

Nice blog.

62264209
>>62264197
>consistent ~80% hitrate since 2024, including through the war in which random Presidential tweets can knock 5% off orange coin's value
>unreliable

62264602
>>62264209
Wow so 80 percent of the time it works all the time? Shut up and take my money!!!!1!!!

62264608
>>62263829
they operate on a higher level, they have all the obvious models and they play against them

62264640
>>62261213
So double X is confirmation? Looks good but don't you keep getting buy signals all the way down?

>>62264209
This can still be valuable as a tool for high income people who just average down.

62264678
>>62264640
>Looks good but don't you keep getting buy signals all the way down?
The system generates 4 weeks of likely buy/sell points using a schizo physics simulation, then close to the date confirms or invalidates them (X or check) using 2 basic liquidity momentum indicators. This month's chart, for example, was generated May 4. The combined physics-liquidity system predicts market pivots with about 80% accuracy, which is insane for something forecasting that far out. The demo strategy that just trades BTC once or twice a week with 1x lev is up ~700% since 2024

The lighter colored triangles are hybrid liquidity-physics signals. Getting close to a predicted buy/sell point (48 hours before), strong momentum on the liquidity side can advance or delay a buy/sell point by 24 hours. Strong bullish liquidity advances buys and delays sells, strong bearish liquidity advances sells and delays buys. Usually when you get a string of hybrid-physics signals like that, it's smart to layer in orders on each day and get heavier toward the end of the range.

The yellow diamonds are points where you get sudden "surprise" accelerations or trend reversals. The model is really good at picking them out, if you look at the chart.

Of course, sucks to be me since it looks like I've posted here right before the system got it wrong lol

62264688
>>62264678
So are you running it in production or just simulating it? Good job bro, this is cool.

62264707
>>62264688
>So are you running it in production or just simulating it? Good job bro, this is cool.
Thanks Anon! It's in production, web dashboard with live indicators and history back to December 2024, and I've been posting on Twitter since last October. It's taken a few years to develop and tune the model.

There are lots of physics-based trade models out there, modeling demand as particle density and stuff like that, but as far as I can tell this is the only public one that can predict market pivots weeks in advance. I have noticed that about 90% of the time, a predicted buy/sell that falls on a weekend gets frontrun on the last trading day before, which makes me suspect some institutions have figured it out. Which, now that I think about it, should've included the upcoming May 25th Sell being on Memorial Day

62265317
Okay, and can I use it?

62265489
>>62264608
Bog and Magog cannot be defeated
